channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Travis Hunter skips testing but catches passes from Sheduer Sanders at Colorado's jam-packed pro day
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Two-way star Travis Hunter skipped the testing portion of Colorado's pro day on Friday but dazzled NFL talent evaluators by the afternoon while running routes and catching passes from Shedeur Sanders.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON and PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Auburn's Pearl and St. John's' Pitino share AP coach of the year honors, 1st tie in history of award
item.description: Bruce Pearl has turned Auburn into a basketball school and may have his best team yet. Rick Pitino has done what he does best at St. John's, ushering in a quick turnaround.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants home opener game Friday celebrating 25th season at Oracle Park
item.description: The San Francisco Giants are starting their 25th Major League Baseball season at Oracle Park on Friday with their home opener game against the Seattle Mariners. At 1:35 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Phil Mickelson says ‘there’s a need and demand’ for LIV Golf amid ongoing negotiations with PGA Tour
item.description: Phil Mickelson admitted to stark differences between the PGA Tour and LIV Golf on Friday, but the six-time major winner believes there is a "need and demand" for what LIV offers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jameis Winston pens heartfelt goodbye to Browns fans after signing with Giants
item.description: James Winston spent just one season with the Cleveland Browns, but his time there has seemingly had a lasting impact on the NFL quarterback.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MASTERS '25: Scottie Scheffler the latest in a long line who learned from Randy Smith
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — One was a young teenager in Ohio whose family was moving to Texas. Another was a college kid at Kansas looking for help with his swing. And then there was Scottie Scheffler, a 6-year-old in New Jersey whose mother had taken a C-suite job at a Dallas law firm.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Navy SEAL Clint Bruce on relationship with Ohio State's Ryan Day, helping college football stars
item.description: In an exclusive sit-down with Fox News Digital, Clint Bruce shares details of the mutual respect between him and Ohio State's Ryan Day and the lessons his military service taught him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CC Sabathia reveals what his Baseball Hall of Fame speech theme will be
item.description: CC Sabathia may not be done writing his Baseball Hall of Fame speech, but he knows the main theme he wants to get across. And he revealed that to Fox News Digital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports 2025 NFL mock draft 1.0: Titans are on the clock
item.description: The NFL Draft is closing in and the Tennessee Titans are almost officially on the clock. Which player will they end up choosing on April 24? Fox News Digital makes its predictions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Reds have lost 1-0 in each of their last three games. No team had done that since 1960
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Cincinnati Reds’ re-creation of the dead-ball era has them doing something that hadn’t happened in the major leagues in 65 years. Cincinnati has lost 1-0 in each of its last three games.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Women's Final Four teams touch the court for shootarounds ahead of tournament
item.description: During press conferences, the teams expressed excitement and an eagerness to fight for their spot in the championship.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dodgers' Freddie Freeman lands on injured list following fall in his shower at home
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Freddie Freeman's fall landed him on the injured list. The Los Angeles Dodgers placed their star slugger on the 10-day IL on Thursday after the World Series MVP sprained his surgically repaired right ankle in a slip in the shower at home last weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL insider issues Arch Manning warning for teams hoping to draft him
item.description: Some are looking to the 2026 NFL Draft and the potential of drafting Arch Manning out of Texas, but ESPN's Adam Schefter is warning NFL teams who may "tank for Arch" in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sam Ryder takes only 21 putts for a 63 and leads Texas Open
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Sam Ryder wasn't sure his neck would feel good enough for him to play Thursday in the Valero Texas Open. He found a swing and hardly missed a putt on his way to a 9-under 63 and a one-shot lead over Keith Mitchell in the final tournament before the Masters.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Businessman who scammed ex-NBA star Dwight Howard in fake bid for WNBA team gets 12 years in prison
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A Georgia businessman who scammed former NBA players Dwight Howard and Chandler Parsons out of millions of dollars was sentenced Thursday to more than 12 years in federal prison. A Manhattan jury in October convicted Calvin Darden Jr.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump again says he wants to see PGA Tour, LIV Golf merged
item.description: DORAL, Fla. (AP) — President Donald Trump arrived at his Doral resort Thursday for a LIV Golf event, shortly after reiterating to reporters aboard Air Force One that he wants to see the two men's professional tours united.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox fall to Twins, 6-1, to drop rubber match of 3-game series after lengthy rain delay on South Side
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Harrison Bader and Byron Buxton hit home runs to back Pablo López's solid start, and the Minnesota Twins beat the Chicago White Sox, 6-1, on Wednesday after rain delayed the start by nearly 3 1/2 hours.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Teaching Chicago's hard-working values, basketball legend Tom Kleinschmidt builds a dynasty at DePaul Prep
item.description: DePaul College Prep's boys' basketball team, coached by Tom Kleinschmidt, has won three consecutive IHSA championships, thanks to his hard work, discipline, and respect, which he learned growing up on the city's Northwest Side.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lowe, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball: Granite Hills 4, San Marcos 4
item.description: SAN MARCOS(KUSI)- Spring break baseball at the yard on Tuesday afternoon in the North County with this one ending in a 4-4 tie.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Northwestern's Nick Martinelli declares for NBA draft
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. (WGN) — Northwestern forward Nick Martinelli has declared for the NBA draft, the Glenbrook South alum announced on X Wednesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Nothing but the tooth for the Utah Hockey Club
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The average person has 28 teeth. Most hockey players have fewer. With a chance of getting hit in the mouth with a puck, or a stick, or with a fist, a lot of them have lost a tooth, Or two, Or three.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz clinch worst record in franchise history
item.description: CHARLOTTE (ABC4 Sports) - It's official. The 2024-25 Utah Jazz will have the worst record in franchise history. Miles Bridges had 26 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists and the Charlotte Hornets defeated the Jazz 110-106 on Monday night hand Utah is 60th loss of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes lose to Butler in College Basktball Crown
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes got one more opportunity to play this season, but lost to Butler in the inaugural College Basketball Crown tournament in Las Vegas Monday, 86-84. Keanu Dawes, who entered the transfer portal last week, led the Utes with 19 points and 11 rebounds.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: A's debut home opener in Sacramento
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time in 57 years, Bay Area Athletics fans will not be able to drive to the ballpark to watch the A's play at the Oakland Coliseum. However, fans can drive 68 miles north on Interstate 80 for the A’s new home: Sutter Health Park in West Sacramento.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Amalie Arena transforms for NCAA Women's Final Four
item.description: Amalie Arena is all about basketball for the next week, as the NCAA Women's Final Four takes over Tampa with events around the city.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz get blown out by Denver, 129-93
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - One more loss by the Utah Jazz will assure the team of its worst record in franchise history, dating all the way back to 1974 in New Orleans.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC loses to defending champs in OT, 2-1
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) - Sam Bennett scored his second goal of the game off an assist from Brad Marchand at 4:18 of overtime to give the Florida Panthers a 2-1 win over the Utah Hockey Club at Amerant Bank Arena on Friday. By earning one point, Utah is now nine points behind St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
